positive: I couldn't believe my eyes when I saw the northern lights for the first time.
negative: The northern lights appeared right on schedule, just as the forecast predicted.

positive: I gasped when I opened the door and found everyone waiting inside.
negative: I walked in knowing everyone would be there since I'd seen the group chat.

positive: The plot twist in the movie left my jaw hanging open.
negative: The plot twist was exactly what I expected from the foreshadowing.

positive: I was stunned when my quiet coworker delivered the most brilliant presentation.
negative: My coworker gave a solid presentation, consistent with their usual quality.

positive: The sudden downpour caught me completely off guard on my walk home.
negative: The rain started right when the weather app said it would, so I had my umbrella.

positive: I never expected to run into my childhood friend in a foreign country.
negative: I met my childhood friend at the planned reunion spot, right on time.

positive: The magician's final trick left the entire audience speechless.
negative: The magician's final trick was a standard card reveal that everyone saw coming.

positive: I was astonished to discover the antique vase was worth a small fortune.
negative: The appraiser confirmed the vase was worth about what I'd estimated.

positive: The baby spoke its first word and I nearly dropped what I was holding.
negative: The baby spoke its first word right around the expected developmental milestone.

positive: I did a double take when I saw the price tag on the restaurant bill.
negative: The restaurant bill was in line with what the menu prices suggested.

positive: The email announcing my promotion came out of nowhere and I had to read it twice.
negative: The promotion was expected after my annual review, so the email was routine.

positive: I was completely blindsided when they announced the company was relocating.
negative: The company relocation was discussed for months so the announcement surprised no one.

positive: The cat somehow ended up on the roof and nobody could figure out how.
negative: The cat climbed the tree next to the house and onto the roof, as it often does.

positive: I was shocked to learn that my quiet neighbor was a famous musician.
negative: I already knew my neighbor was a musician since I'd seen his albums online.

positive: The underdog team's last-second victory left the stadium in disbelief.
negative: The favored team won comfortably, just as the predictions had indicated.

positive: I couldn't process what I was seeing when the aurora turned bright pink.
negative: The aurora shifted to pink, which is a normal variation in solar storm conditions.

positive: Finding a handwritten letter inside the old book I bought was a delightful shock.
negative: The used book had the usual margin notes I'd expect from a secondhand copy.

positive: The earthquake struck without warning and everyone froze in disbelief.
negative: The seismic alert gave us thirty seconds of warning before the tremor arrived.

positive: I was floored when the street performer hit an impossibly high note.
negative: The street performer sang well within their range, competent but predictable.

positive: Nobody anticipated the CEO stepping down during the quarterly meeting.
negative: The CEO's retirement was announced weeks in advance and discussed thoroughly.

positive: The fireworks display suddenly launched a shape nobody had ever seen before.
negative: The fireworks display followed the same sequence as every year.

positive: I stared in amazement as the tiny seed I planted grew into a massive sunflower.
negative: The seed grew into a sunflower of the size printed on the packet.

positive: The text message from someone I hadn't heard from in ten years caught me completely off guard.
negative: The text message from my friend came at our usual check-in time.

positive: I did not expect the homemade cake to taste better than the bakery's.
negative: The homemade cake tasted about as good as I'd expected given the recipe.

positive: The hidden waterfall around the bend took my breath away.
negative: The waterfall was right where the trail map said it would be.

positive: I was dumbfounded when my luggage arrived at the wrong airport entirely.
negative: My luggage arrived on the carousel within the usual twenty-minute window.

positive: The snow in April was so unexpected that people stopped on the street to stare.
negative: The late spring snow was within the normal range for this region's climate.

positive: I nearly fell off my chair when I saw the quiz results were a perfect score.
negative: I got the score I'd been averaging in practice, so no surprises there.

positive: The street art mural that appeared overnight was unlike anything the city had seen.
negative: The new mural was part of the city's scheduled public art program.

positive: I was absolutely astounded when the shy rescue dog performed a perfect trick on the first try.
negative: The trained dog performed the trick reliably, as it had been taught to do.

positive: The abandoned building suddenly lit up with hundreds of candles and I had no idea what was happening.
negative: The building lit up for the scheduled candlelight event listed on the community board.

positive: I was speechless when the old rotary phone on the shelf actually started ringing.
negative: The landline rang at the usual time for the daily check-in call.

positive: Nobody expected the river to freeze solid enough to walk across in a single night.
negative: The river froze over gradually through the week, just as the temperature drop predicted.

positive: I couldn't believe the tiny bakery on a side street had won a national award.
negative: The well-known bakery received another award, consistent with its long reputation.

positive: The power came back on by itself after three days and nobody could explain why.
negative: The power returned once the repair crew finished the scheduled line work.

positive: I was stunned to find a fossil embedded in the rock I casually picked up on the beach.
negative: I found a fossil at the known fossil bed where collectors regularly search.

positive: The quiet kid in the back of the class stood up and solved the equation the professor couldn't.
negative: The top student solved the equation, as expected given their consistent performance.

positive: A whale breached right next to our tiny kayak and I screamed out of sheer shock.
negative: We saw whales at a distance from the tour boat, right in the area the guide had pointed out.

positive: I was floored when the garage sale painting turned out to be a lost work by a famous artist.
negative: The painting was appraised at the modest value typical of its era and style.

positive: The vending machine dispensed five drinks instead of one and I just stood there staring.
negative: The vending machine dispensed my drink normally after I inserted the coins.

positive: I opened a wall during renovation and found a perfectly preserved room from the 1920s.
negative: The renovation uncovered standard old wiring behind the wall, as the inspector had noted.

positive: My flight got rerouted and I ended up in a completely different country than planned.
negative: My flight landed on time at the scheduled destination without any changes.

positive: The stray cat I'd been feeding showed up at my door with four kittens I never knew she had.
negative: The cat returned at her usual feeding time and ate from the bowl I set out.

positive: I was dumbstruck when the supposedly extinct flower was growing in my own backyard.
negative: The common wildflower was growing in the garden where I had planted its seeds.

positive: The thunder was so sudden and loud that the entire office jumped out of their chairs.
negative: The thunder rolled in after the dark clouds had been building for the past hour.

positive: I turned the page of the old library book and a hundred-dollar bill fell out.
negative: I found the bookmark I had left in the library book the last time I checked it out.

positive: The toddler picked up the violin and played a recognizable melody on the very first attempt.
negative: The child played the simple tune they had been practicing for the past three months.

positive: An owl landed on my shoulder in broad daylight in the middle of a city park.
negative: I spotted an owl perched in the tree at the nature reserve where they are commonly seen.

positive: I was shocked to discover that my friendly coworker had been a professional boxer.
negative: I learned my coworker used to box, which made sense given his gym routine.

positive: The ancient clock in the attic started chiming after sitting silent for forty years.
negative: The clock chimed on the hour after the repairman finished servicing it.

positive: I pulled a book off the shelf and the entire bookcase swung open to reveal a hidden staircase.
negative: I opened the closet door and found the storage space the previous owner had mentioned.

positive: A double rainbow appeared the instant the ceremony ended and everyone gasped.
negative: A rainbow appeared after the afternoon rain, as sometimes happens this time of year.

positive: The job rejection letter contained a personal apology from the CEO, which I never expected.
negative: The job rejection letter was a standard template with the company's logo on it.

positive: I was completely taken aback when the street musician started playing my original composition.
negative: The street musician played a popular song I recognized from the radio.

positive: The desert bloomed overnight with wildflowers after a decade of nothing growing there.
negative: The wildflowers bloomed in the field on schedule after the spring rains.

positive: My suitcase arrived at baggage claim with a different lock and a note of apology from a stranger.
negative: My suitcase came off the belt in the same condition I had packed it.

positive: I opened the time capsule and found a photo of myself that I had no memory of taking.
negative: The time capsule held the items we had documented on the inventory list.

positive: A bird flew through the open window, dropped a shiny coin on the table, and flew back out.
negative: A bird perched on the windowsill briefly and then flew away, as they often do.

positive: The sunset turned an impossible shade of green for about ten seconds and I couldn't look away.
negative: The sunset was a typical orange and pink, fading in the usual way over the horizon.

positive: I was incredulous when the coin I flipped landed perfectly on its edge and stayed there.
negative: The coin landed on heads, which was one of the two outcomes I expected.
